text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, software can paint pictures, compose music, and write stories in seconds. Some AI-generated art has even won competitions, surprising many people. Similarly, AI can create original music by learning patterns from thousands of songs. In writing, AI tools help people draft emails, poems, or even novels quickly. However, human creativity is different. It comes from personal experiences, emotions, and imagination. Machines do not feel joy or sadness; they just copy patterns they have seen. While AI can produce impressive results, it cannot truly replace the human touch. Ultimately, AI is a useful tool, but real creativity still lives within us.
